causal_chains.description: Late throttle application compromises corner exit speed

zones.template_feedback:

  Severity: ██████████ (100%)
  Estimated time impact: ~0.521s

  Key deviations:
    ▼ RPM: Engine RPM is lower than expected — check your gear selection
      Deviation: 834.7 rpm below expert level

  Root cause analysis:
    → Late throttle application compromises corner exit speed (confidence: 100%)
    💡 Tip: Get on the throttle earlier and more decisively on corner exit to maximise straight-line speed.
zones.llm_feedback:
Here's your coaching feedback:

You're doing a great job navigating this section of the lap, but to take it to the next level, focus on applying the throttle earlier to maximize corner exit speed. You're currently applying 18.5% more throttle than the expert, but it's coming on a bit too late, resulting in a 9.9 km/h speed deficit. Try to get on the gas 1-2 tenths earlier and aim to trail-brake into the apex, then smoothly apply power to carry more speed out of the turn. This will help you shave off precious seconds on your lap time.

Here's your coaching feedback:

This will help you match the expert's speed and maintain a more consistent pace."

causal_chains.description: Insufficient braking leads to excess speed at the apex
Excess apex speed causes understeer (high lateral load)
Late throttle application compromises corner exit speed

zones.template_feedback:
━━━ Zone 3 (33.7% – 36.2% of lap) ━━━
  Severity: ██████████ (100%)
  Estimated time impact: ~0.058s

  Key deviations:
    ▼ RPM: Engine RPM is lower than expected — check your gear selection
      Deviation: 713.0 rpm below expert level

  Root cause analysis:
    → Insufficient braking leads to excess speed at the apex (confidence: 52%)
    💡 Tip: Try initiating your braking earlier and with more initial pressure to scrub speed before the turn-in point.
    → Excess apex speed causes understeer (high lateral load) (confidence: 42%)
    💡 Tip: The excess entry speed is overloading the front tyres. Carry less speed in to maintain grip.
zones.llm_feedback:
Here's your coaching feedback:

You're entering the turn too hot, which is causing understeer at the apex. To improve, focus on braking earlier and more aggressively, aiming to brake 2% harder than your current effort. This will help you slow down before the apex and maintain a tighter line. Additionally, try to trail-brake more smoothly, reducing the steering angle by 6.7° to maintain a more neutral setup.

This will allow you to carry more speed into the corner and set up for a better apex.

Here's your coaching feedback:

You're doing a great job navigating the turn, but there are a few areas to fine-tune. To improve your apex speed, try braking 0.1 seconds later, which should allow you to carry an extra 11.1 km/h into the corner. summary_llm: Based on your lap analysis, the single biggest area for improvement is your corner exit speed, which is consistently compromised by late throttle application in Zones 1, 2, and 4. To address this, focus on applying the throttle earlier in Zone 1, aiming to reach 834.7 rpm by the 19.1% mark. This will help you carry more speed into the next corner and potentially shave off a significant portion of your estimated 1.305s time loss. Keep up the good work, and with consistent practice, you'll see improvements in your overall lap time.
